summary: The live benchmark validator is implemented and now rejects benchmark output bundle paths borrowed from another DF-242 scenario. The current DF-241/DF-242 candidate collector proves existing live artifacts can be assembled into a blocked Golden Path candidate with direct artifact regression coverage, and the same bundle now flows through the packaged-run producer as a blocked handoff artifact. There are still zero packaged benchmark output bundles and zero passed live benchmarks.
